This AGREEMENT between [THEIR COMPANY NAME] LLC (herein after “CLIENT”) and [YOUR COMAPNY], LLC (herein after “INDEPENDENT CONTRACTOR”) is entered into and shall commence on May 1st, 2017.



1. TERM OF AGREEMENT

This agreement will be effective on May 1st, 2017 and continue until completion of agreement term. This agreement may also be terminated in accordance with the provisions of sections 8 and 9 of this agreement.



2. INDEPENDENT CONTRACTOR STATUS

It is the express intention of the parties involved that the “CONTRACTOR” is an INDEPENDENT contractor and not an employee. This contract does not create an employee relationship between the client and the contractor. Both the client and the contractor agree that for tax purposes the contractor is not an employee of the client.



3. SERVICES TO BE RENDERED BY THE CONTRACTOR

The contractor has agreed to perform the following specific services as stated in the Description of Services attached.



4. METHODS FOR PERFORMANCE

The Contractor, being an independent contractor, is free to choose the methods, details, and means of performing the above specified services. The Contractor may, at his own expense, employ any assistance deemed by the Contractor to be necessary to perform the services. Client has no control over or right to supervise any assistance Contractor deems advisable to employ. The Contractor shall perform the services required by this agreement at any location and at such times as the Contractor shall determine without interfering with any schedule already set up by Client or Contractor.



5. COMPENSATION FOR SERVICES RENDERED

Compensation for this project will be collected in the form of a $100,000 30 day recurring service fee. The agreement will commence upon completion of the payment paid in full. 



Payments can be made in Credit Card/Debit Card and should be made payable to: 



Jeremy Haynes



80 SW 8th St

Suite 24

Miami, Florida 33136



Should either party require it, payment schedule is subject to modification and will require an amendment of this agreement.







6. MODIFICATION OF SERVICES

Changes to the original services agreed upon will require an amendment of this AGREEMENT. In the event that there is a difference in cost, the payment schedule must be modified as well to reflect the new cost. The most current AGREEMENT will supersede any prior AGREEMENT. Verbal agreements WILL NOT supersede any written Agreement. All changes MUST be written and amended in the AGREEMENT.



7. CLIENT OBLIGATIONS

The client must establish all relevant details and requests necessary for the performance of the Contractor prior to commencement of work.  If Client makes additional requests that affect the process in which the work is being completed, additional fees may apply and the AGREEMENT must be modified. The Client must provide CLEAR instructions and specifications and MUST make sure that these are written and UNDERSTOOD by the Contractor.



8. AUTOMATIC TERMINATION OF THIS AGREEMENT

This agreement will terminate automatically on the occurrence of any of the following events:

	a. Bankruptcy of the Contractor or Client. 

	b. Sale of the business by either party.

	c. Death of either party.



9. TERMINATION AT DISCRETION OF PARTIES

The parties may terminate the agreement for any of the following reasons:

	a. Termination by the Client for default of Contractor. The Client may terminate the agreement at any time after the Contractor fails to respond to a written notice of default and demand to perform.

	b. Termination by Contractor for breach by the Client. The Contractor may terminate the agreement at any time after the Client fails to respond to a written notice that he/she is in breach of the agreement and he/she is requested to cure.

	c. Termination for failure to meet agreed upon payment schedule.

This is an intangible marketing service that cannot be canceled or revoked. Once invoice is paid, buyer agrees there are no cancellations, returns, or refunds of any sort because of the nature of services rendered.



10. GENERAL PROVISIONS:

All work will be completed in a professional manner according to standard practices. Any alteration or deviation from specifications above involving extra costs will be executed only upon written order and will become an extra charge over and above the estimate of this AGREEMENT. All work created will be turned over to Client and Client retains sole ownership. Contractor retains the right to use work produced as part of Contractor’s portfolio for future references.































Client :	[THEIR COMPANY NAME]

Contractor : YOUR COMPANY NAME, LLC

Description of Services to be rendered are as follows: 





Premium Everything Package For [THEIR COMPANY NAME], LLC only: 

$100,000/30 day RECURRING SERVICE Agreement:



Social Media Strategy Development - we consult you on an initial and ongoing basis to define the parameters for the best approach to take action with for all the social media content that will be created and distributed. 

Social Media Consulting - We take a deep dive on your social accounts and the social accounts of your competitors and we advise you on what positioning you and your brand should take to best align with current and future leads and customers. ONLY FACEBOOK, INSTAGRAM ,TWITTER ACCOUNTS FOR 30 DAYS UP TO 90 POSTS EACH.

Community Management - we help you build and maintain a community or 'tribe' that is engaged via groups or social media forums to engage leads, customers and fans long term with another organic--brand owned distribution channel. 1 FACEBOOK GROUP BEING MANAGED

Crisis Management - if something should happen like a spike in negative feedback, a brand disaster occurs (rare, but why not be prepared for the unexpected), or whatever else can be defined as a crisis to handle such circumstances in real time and with tenacity. WE’LL DELETE BAD COMMENTS AND PRODUCE POSITIVE COMPANY 

Measurement & Monitoring - we deliver a weekly report for all engagement, fan growth, lead generation and sales numbers via an analytic report that's easy to comprehend and explained by an account manager for what happened in that 7 day window and what's projected to happen next. MONTHLY REPORTING ON SPROUT

Social Listening - we actively monitor all social channels we're taking on for fan, lead and customer posts and communications via monitoring tools to allow us to stay on top of the social trends and hear what the customer wants next or now.

Article Creation & Distribution - we staff a copy writer on your account to create articles for social channels like LinkedIn, Medium and sometimes we take those articles and turn them into articles for Huffington Post, Inc, Forbes, Fortune, Business.com, Influencive, Pursuit and more.

Social Selling Consulting & Execution - we consult you and your brand on an ongoing basis for what direction, message and content can be created by us internally to allow you to generate leads and sales. 

YouTube Views/Subscribers Growth - we actively take the video content provided to us by you and your brand and post it on Youtube to ensure your contents return and engagement is maximized. 15% SUBSCRIBER GROWTH FOR 30 DAYS ONGOING

Mass Email Blasts - UP TO 500K EMAILS SENT PER MONTH

Personal Automated Email & Text Message Campaigns - Marketing Automation Implementation - UP TO 3 INFUSIONSOFT CAMPAIGNS WITH 30 EMAILS PER CAMPAIGN OVER 3O DAYS

Follow-up Campaigns with the intent to Close Leads or Schedule Appts. Referral campaigns

Review campaigns for surveys, reviews, and feedback

Content Engagement Campaigns (drive traffic to blogs, videos, offers, etc.) 

Landing Page Creation - UP TO 5 FUNNELS

Account Review & Goal Setting Keyword Research for all digital advertising mediums

Account Structure & Restructure for all digital advertising mediums and CRM’s

Text Ad Creation & Optimization Dynamic Keyword Insertion for Google PPC and Google Display Targeting

Google Display Network Campaign Creation And Consistent Optimization 

Google Search Network Campaign Creation And Consistent Optimization 

Facebook Advertising Campaign Creation And Consistent Optimization

Remarketing Campaigns And Consistent Optimization 

Conversion Tracking And Consistent Optimization 

Detailed Performance Reporting And Consistent Optimization 

Unlimited Digital Advertising Campaigns on All Other Digital Advertising Mediums 

Maintenance & monitoring every other day for optimization

Unlimited Strategy and Revenue Development 

Business infrastructure Set Up And Maintenance For Online Information Based Selling Company.

Unlimited Branding Campaign and Strategy 

Direct Consulting and Mentorship from Jeremy (Grant Cardone Trained sales person who worked with him for over a year as well) for Sales Processes and Training for Contextual Follow Up Generated From Funnel Systems.)

Unlimited Funnel Creation, Maintenance and Updates

Project manager

Digital advertising through Facebook, Google Adwords, Youtube, LinkedIn or any other applicable digital advertising channels. 

Website development (if projected costs are exceeded with requested monthly development to execute ideas is exceed, the price will go up to cover additional expenses)

Content creation for website, publish, distribution, etc
